zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine de Ufford於1318年出生在英國諾福爾可時，她的父親Robert de Ufford I20歲，母親Margaret Norwich21歲。她於1335年5月6日與Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1370年在英國諾福爾可米德萊頓享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine de Ufford于1318年出生在英国諾福爾可时，她的父亲Robert de Ufford I20岁，母亲Margaret Norwich21岁。她于1335年5月6日与Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1370年在英国諾福爾可米德萊頓享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ufford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ufford (Northamptonshire), Ufford (Suffolk), or Offord Cluny or Offord Darcy (Huntingdonshire). The Northamptonshire and Suffolk placenames derive from the Old English personal name Uffa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’. For the Huntingdonshire placename see Offord , with which the surname may have been confused.

variants.name: Offord
meanings: English (East Anglia and London): habitational name from Offord Cluny and Offord Darcy in Huntindgonshire. The placename derives from Old English upp ‘up, upper’ + ford ‘ford’.
English: alternatively, from a lost place called Offord near Pennyford in Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Offa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of Katherine , derived from the pet form Kit + the hypocoristic suffix -y. It is also used as an independent given name.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine de Ufford was born in 1318, in Norfolk, England, her father, Robert de Ufford I, was 20 and her mother, Margaret Norwich, was 21. She married Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales on 6 May 1335, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1370, in Middleton, Norfolk, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine de Ufford est née en 1318, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Ufford I, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margaret Norwich, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales le 6 mai 1335, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1370, à Middleton, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine de Ufford 1318 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Ufford I 20 und ihre Mutter Margaret Norwich 21. Sie hat am 6. Mai 1335 in England Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1370 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Middleton, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine de Ufford è nata il nel 1318 nel Norfolk, England, sua padre, Robert de Ufford I, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Margaret Norwich, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales il 6 maggio 1335, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1370, nel Middleton, Norfolk, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine de Uffordが1318年にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Robert de Ufford Iは20歳，母Margaret Norwichは21歳であった。1335年5月6日にイギリスでRobert de Scales 3rd Baron Scalesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1370年にイギリスノーフォルクミッドレトンで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine de Ufford(이)가 1318년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Ufford I(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Norwich(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1335년 5월 6일 영국에서 Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1370년 영국 노르폴크 미들레턴에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine de Ufford nasceu em 1318, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Ufford I, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Norwich, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales em 6 de maio de 1335, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1370, em Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine de Ufford родилась в 1318 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Ufford I было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Norwich, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales 6 мая 1335 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1370 г. в местности миддлетон, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine de Ufford nació en 1318, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Ufford I, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Margaret Norwich, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales el 6 de mayo de 1335, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1370, en Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
